title: Rename Zapier Event 0003 from Onboarded to Activated
description:
Rename the Zapier event 0003 from 'Onboarded' to 'Activated' to accurately reflect the event's meaning. The event fires when a user adds their first object, which represents activation (first meaningful product usage), not onboarding completion.

'Onboarded' will be reserved for a future event tied to when a user subscribes and pays (potentially triggered by the Stripe callback).

The Zapier webhook endpoint URL was also updated to a new catch hook.
acceptance_criteria: Event 0003 is labeled as 'Activated' in the Zapier webhook request
Webhook endpoint URL is updated to the new Zapier catch hook
A future event for 'Onboarded' can be created separately when needed
middleware_changes: Event 0003 name changed from 'Onboarded' to 'Activated' in the Zapier webhook payload. Endpoint URL updated to new Zapier hook.
implementation_notes: Event taxonomy: 0001 = First Time Login, 0002 = Recurring Login, 0003 = Activated (first object added). Onboarding event to be created later tied to Stripe payment callback.
comment_summary: Developer updated the label and endpoint URL. Product owner confirmed and planned to test on staging.
